source_files: public/locales/<lang>/loc_data_map.json for lang in de, en, fr
_meta.description: Data map page: visual inventory of which data exists per parliament.
_meta.format: Each entry: context (where the string appears in the UI, its role, placeholders and length/grammar constraints) + the current de/en/fr texts as translation reference. Use the context when translating into a new language; a null text means the key is missing in that language file.
_meta.generated: 2026-07-13, code-verified against app/ sources; regenerate when public/locales texts or consuming components change.

data_map.title.context: Page title (h1) of the Data Map page (/project/data-map, app/routes/pages/project/data_map/data_map.tsx), a visual map of parlhub's data entities and their connections. Short noun phrase.

data_map.lead.context: Lead/intro paragraph under the h1 on the Data Map page (/project/data-map, app/routes/pages/project/data_map/data_map.tsx), explaining that each card in the diagram is a searchable catalogue and lines show entity connections. Conversational tone, informal address in de ('Wähle').
data_map.lead.en: How parlhub's data fits together. Each card is a catalogue you can search and explore. The lines show how the entities connect. Pick anything to dive in.
data_map.lead.de: Wie die Daten von parlhub zusammenhängen. Jede Karte ist ein durchsuchbarer Katalog. Die Linien zeigen, wie die Bereiche verbunden sind. Wähle einen aus, um einzutauchen.
data_map.lead.fr: Comment s'articulent les données de parlhub. Chaque carte est un catalogue à explorer. Les traits montrent les liens entre les domaines. Choisissez-en un pour plonger.

data_map.diagram_label.context: aria-label of the diagram container in the Data Map diagram (app/components/data_map/DataMap.tsx) (screen-reader only, describes the SVG diagram of entities and their connections). Not visually rendered; length not critical.
data_map.diagram_label.en: Diagram of parlhub's data entities and how they connect
data_map.diagram_label.de: Diagramm der Datenbereiche von parlhub und ihrer Verbindungen
data_map.diagram_label.fr: Diagramme des domaines de données de parlhub et de leurs liens

data_map.clusters.parliament.context: Cluster zone label in the Data Map diagram (app/components/data_map/DataMap.tsx): short uppercase caption over a group of entity cards (also the section heading in the mobile list fallback); groups People, Bodies and Groups (the institutional actors). Keep short, noun.

data_map.clusters.proceedings.context: Cluster zone label in the Data Map diagram (app/components/data_map/DataMap.tsx): short uppercase caption over a group of entity cards (also the section heading in the mobile list fallback); groups Affairs, Votings and Meetings (parliamentary business/activity; de 'Ratsbetrieb' = council operations). Keep short, noun.

data_map.clusters.records.context: Cluster zone label in the Data Map diagram (app/components/data_map/DataMap.tsx): short uppercase caption over a group of entity cards (also the section heading in the mobile list fallback); groups Speeches, Texts and Documents (the written/recorded output). Keep short, noun.

data_map.clusters.lobbying.context: Cluster zone label in the Data Map diagram (app/components/data_map/DataMap.tsx): short uppercase caption over a group of entity cards (also the section heading in the mobile list fallback); groups Interests and Organizations (declared lobby ties). Keep short, noun.

data_map.nodes.people.label.context: Card title in the Data Map diagram (app/components/data_map/DataMap.tsx): short name of the 'People' entity catalogue; the card is a link to that catalogue. Plural noun, must stay short (fits a 160px-wide card). Means MPs/parliamentarians and officials.

data_map.nodes.people.desc.context: One-line description under the card title in the Data Map diagram (app/components/data_map/DataMap.tsx), small muted text summarizing what the entity catalogue contains. 'Mandates' = official positions/lobby mandates held by MPs.
data_map.nodes.people.desc.en: MPs and officials: profiles, votes, speeches and mandates.
data_map.nodes.people.desc.de: Abgeordnete und Amtsträger: Profile, Stimmen, Reden und Mandate.
data_map.nodes.people.desc.fr: Élus et responsables : profils, votes, discours et mandats.

data_map.nodes.bodies.label.context: Card title in the Data Map diagram (app/components/data_map/DataMap.tsx): short name of the 'Bodies' entity catalogue; the card is a link to that catalogue. Plural noun, must stay short (fits a 160px-wide card). Means parliamentary bodies: parliaments, councils, committees (de 'Gremien').

data_map.nodes.bodies.desc.context: One-line description under the card title in the Data Map diagram (app/components/data_map/DataMap.tsx), small muted text summarizing what the entity catalogue contains. 'Business' here = parliamentary affairs (de 'Geschäfte').
data_map.nodes.bodies.desc.en: Parliaments, councils and committees, with their members and business.
data_map.nodes.bodies.desc.de: Parlamente, Räte und Kommissionen mit ihren Mitgliedern und Geschäften.
data_map.nodes.bodies.desc.fr: Parlements, conseils et commissions, avec leurs membres et travaux.

data_map.nodes.groups.label.context: Card title in the Data Map diagram (app/components/data_map/DataMap.tsx): short name of the 'Groups' entity catalogue; the card is a link to that catalogue. Plural noun, must stay short (fits a 160px-wide card). Means parliamentary groups/fractions (de 'Fraktionen'), not generic groups.

data_map.nodes.groups.desc.context: One-line description under the card title in the Data Map diagram (app/components/data_map/DataMap.tsx), small muted text summarizing what the entity catalogue contains. 'Voting cohesion' = how unified the group votes (de 'Geschlossenheit').
data_map.nodes.groups.desc.en: Parties, factions and committees: membership and voting cohesion.
data_map.nodes.groups.desc.de: Parteien, Fraktionen und Kommissionen: Mitgliedschaft und Geschlossenheit.
data_map.nodes.groups.desc.fr: Partis, groupes et commissions : composition et cohésion de vote.

data_map.nodes.affairs.label.context: Card title in the Data Map diagram (app/components/data_map/DataMap.tsx): short name of the 'Affairs' entity catalogue; the card is a link to that catalogue. Plural noun, must stay short (fits a 160px-wide card). Swiss parliamentary term: legislative business items (de 'Geschäfte').

data_map.nodes.affairs.desc.context: One-line description under the card title in the Data Map diagram (app/components/data_map/DataMap.tsx), small muted text summarizing what the entity catalogue contains. 'Motions, bills' = parliamentary procedural requests and draft legislation (de 'Vorstösse, Vorlagen').
data_map.nodes.affairs.desc.en: Parliamentary business: motions, bills and their outcomes.
data_map.nodes.affairs.desc.de: Parlamentarische Geschäfte: Vorstösse, Vorlagen und ihr Ausgang.
data_map.nodes.affairs.desc.fr: Travaux parlementaires : motions, projets et leur issue.

data_map.nodes.votings.label.context: Card title in the Data Map diagram (app/components/data_map/DataMap.tsx): short name of the 'Votings' entity catalogue; the card is a link to that catalogue. Plural noun, must stay short (fits a 160px-wide card). Means parliamentary roll-call votes (de 'Abstimmungen').

data_map.nodes.votings.desc.context: One-line description under the card title in the Data Map diagram (app/components/data_map/DataMap.tsx), small muted text summarizing what the entity catalogue contains. 'Roll-call votes' = votes where each member's individual choice is recorded.
data_map.nodes.votings.desc.en: Roll-call votes: who voted how, and when.
data_map.nodes.votings.desc.de: Namentliche Abstimmungen: wer wie und wann gestimmt hat.
data_map.nodes.votings.desc.fr: Votes nominatifs : qui a voté quoi, et quand.

data_map.nodes.meetings.label.context: Card title in the Data Map diagram (app/components/data_map/DataMap.tsx): short name of the 'Meetings' entity catalogue; the card is a link to that catalogue. Plural noun, must stay short (fits a 160px-wide card). Means parliamentary sessions and sittings.

data_map.nodes.meetings.desc.context: One-line description under the card title in the Data Map diagram (app/components/data_map/DataMap.tsx), small muted text summarizing what the entity catalogue contains. 'Agendas' = meeting agenda items (Swiss de 'Traktanden').
data_map.nodes.meetings.desc.en: Sessions and sittings: agendas, votes and speeches.
data_map.nodes.meetings.desc.de: Sessionen und Sitzungen: Traktanden, Abstimmungen und Reden.
data_map.nodes.meetings.desc.fr: Sessions et séances : ordres du jour, votes et discours.

data_map.nodes.speeches.label.context: Card title in the Data Map diagram (app/components/data_map/DataMap.tsx): short name of the 'Speeches' entity catalogue; the card is a link to that catalogue. Plural noun, must stay short (fits a 160px-wide card). Means speeches held in parliament.

data_map.nodes.speeches.desc.context: One-line description under the card title in the Data Map diagram (app/components/data_map/DataMap.tsx), small muted text summarizing what the entity catalogue contains. 'Verbatim transcripts' = word-for-word records of parliamentary debate.
data_map.nodes.speeches.desc.en: Verbatim transcripts of what was said, fully searchable.
data_map.nodes.speeches.desc.de: Wörtliche Protokolle des Gesagten, vollständig durchsuchbar.

data_map.nodes.texts.label.context: Card title in the Data Map diagram (app/components/data_map/DataMap.tsx): short name of the 'Texts' entity catalogue; the card is a link to that catalogue. Plural noun, must stay short (fits a 160px-wide card).

data_map.nodes.texts.desc.context: One-line description under the card title in the Data Map diagram (app/components/data_map/DataMap.tsx), small muted text summarizing what the entity catalogue contains. 'Text blocks' = published text fragments; 'press material' = media/press-release content.
data_map.nodes.texts.desc.en: Published text blocks and press material.
data_map.nodes.texts.desc.fr: Blocs de texte publiés et matériel de presse.

data_map.nodes.documents.label.context: Card title in the Data Map diagram (app/components/data_map/DataMap.tsx): short name of the 'Documents' entity catalogue; the card is a link to that catalogue. Plural noun, must stay short (fits a 160px-wide card).

data_map.nodes.documents.desc.context: One-line description under the card title in the Data Map diagram (app/components/data_map/DataMap.tsx), small muted text summarizing what the entity catalogue contains. 'The business' = parliamentary affairs the files are attached to (de 'Geschäfte').
data_map.nodes.documents.desc.en: Files and attachments linked to the business.
data_map.nodes.documents.desc.de: Dateien und Beilagen zu den Geschäften.
data_map.nodes.documents.desc.fr: Fichiers et annexes liés aux travaux.

data_map.nodes.interests.label.context: Card title in the Data Map diagram (app/components/data_map/DataMap.tsx): short name of the 'Interests' entity catalogue; the card is a link to that catalogue. Plural noun, must stay short (fits a 160px-wide card). Means declared interest ties of MPs (lobbying register; de 'Interessenbindungen').

data_map.nodes.interests.desc.context: One-line description under the card title in the Data Map diagram (app/components/data_map/DataMap.tsx), small muted text summarizing what the entity catalogue contains. 'Declared interests' = the register of interests MPs must disclose; 'members' = members of parliament.
data_map.nodes.interests.desc.en: Declared interests and lobby ties of members.

data_map.nodes.organizations.label.context: Card title in the Data Map diagram (app/components/data_map/DataMap.tsx): short name of the 'Organizations' entity catalogue; the card is a link to that catalogue. Plural noun, must stay short (fits a 160px-wide card). Means the companies/associations behind MPs' declared interests.

data_map.nodes.organizations.desc.context: One-line description under the card title in the Data Map diagram (app/components/data_map/DataMap.tsx), small muted text summarizing what the entity catalogue contains. Refers back to the 'Interests' card — the organizations tied to those declared interests.
data_map.nodes.organizations.desc.en: The organisations behind those declared interests.
data_map.nodes.organizations.desc.fr: Les organisations derrière ces liens d'intérêts.

data_map.source.heading.context: Section heading (h2) of the provenance section at the bottom of the Data Map page (/project/data-map, app/routes/pages/project/data_map/data_map.tsx), introducing where the data comes from. Short.

data_map.source.body.context: Prose paragraph in the 'About the data' section of the Data Map page (/project/data-map, app/routes/pages/project/data_map/data_map.tsx): states that all data comes from OpenParlData.ch and is only slightly reshaped. 'parlhub' and 'OpenParlData.ch' are proper names — keep as-is.
data_map.source.body.en: All data comes from OpenParlData.ch. parlhub imports that raw data and reshapes it only slightly. The entities and relationships shown here mirror the source.
data_map.source.body.de: Alle Daten stammen von OpenParlData.ch. parlhub importiert diese Rohdaten und passt sie nur geringfügig an. Die hier gezeigten Bereiche und Verbindungen entsprechen der Quelle.
data_map.source.body.fr: Toutes les données proviennent d'OpenParlData.ch. parlhub importe ces données brutes en les remaniant très légèrement. Les domaines et liens présentés ici reflètent la source.

data_map.source.links_label.context: Small uppercase label above the external-links row in the 'About the data' section of the Data Map page (/project/data-map, app/routes/pages/project/data_map/data_map.tsx). Very short.

data_map.source.openparldata_label.context: Link text for the external link to the OpenParlData.ch website in the 'About the data' section of the Data Map page (/project/data-map, app/routes/pages/project/data_map/data_map.tsx). Proper name/domain — keep unchanged in all languages.

data_map.source.openparldata_href.context: URL value (href of an external link in the 'About the data' section of the Data Map page (/project/data-map, app/routes/pages/project/data_map/data_map.tsx)); identical in all languages — copy verbatim, do NOT translate.

data_map.source.schemas_label.context: Link text for the external link to OpenParlData's data-schema definitions (GitLab) in the 'About the data' section of the Data Map page (/project/data-map, app/routes/pages/project/data_map/data_map.tsx). Short noun phrase.

data_map.source.schemas_href.context: URL value (href of an external link in the 'About the data' section of the Data Map page (/project/data-map, app/routes/pages/project/data_map/data_map.tsx)); identical in all languages — copy verbatim, do NOT translate.

data_map.source.raw_label.context: Link text for the external link to OpenParlData's raw bulk data exports in the 'About the data' section of the Data Map page (/project/data-map, app/routes/pages/project/data_map/data_map.tsx). Short noun phrase.

data_map.source.raw_href.context: URL value (href of an external link in the 'About the data' section of the Data Map page (/project/data-map, app/routes/pages/project/data_map/data_map.tsx)); identical in all languages — copy verbatim, do NOT translate.

metas.data_map.title.context: SEO copy (NOT UI chrome): read in route meta() via metas/loc.ts from the 'loc_data_map' namespace 'metas' block; the interface language selects which file. data_map page SEO <title>.

metas.data_map.desc.context: SEO copy (NOT UI chrome): read in route meta() via metas/loc.ts from the 'loc_data_map' namespace 'metas' block; the interface language selects which file. data_map page meta-description.
metas.data_map.desc.en: An overview map of parlhub's data: people, groups, bodies, affairs, votings, meetings, speeches, documents and lobbying ties, and how they connect. Every node links to its catalogue.
metas.data_map.desc.de: Eine Übersichtskarte der parlhub-Daten: Personen, Fraktionen, Gremien, Geschäfte, Abstimmungen, Sitzungen, Reden, Dokumente und Lobby-Verbindungen, und wie sie zusammenhängen. Jeder Knoten führt zum passenden Katalog.
metas.data_map.desc.fr: Une carte d'ensemble des données de parlhub : personnes, groupes, organes, affaires, votes, séances, discours, documents et liens de lobbying, et comment ils s'articulent. Chaque nœud mène au catalogue correspondant.
metas.data_map.desc.it: Una mappa d'insieme dei dati di parlhub: persone, gruppi, organi, affari, votazioni, sedute, discorsi, documenti e legami di lobbying — e come si collegano. Ogni nodo porta al relativo catalogo.
metas.data_map.desc.es: Un mapa general de los datos de parlhub: personas, grupos, órganos, asuntos, votaciones, sesiones, discursos, documentos y vínculos de lobbying — y cómo se conectan. Cada nodo enlaza a su catálogo.
